title: Ad Astra Oil Well Yeeter
description: Disables generation of Ad Astra Oil Wells
body:
Simple Mod that disables generation of Ad Astra Oil Wells.
Useful if you have other ways of obtaining Oil in your modpack and don't want to have duplicate oils or don't want to have Oceans littered with Oil.

Also removes the Advancement "Ocean Cleanup" since the Oil Bucket required is unobtainable in survival thus locking the progression through the Ad Astra Advancements.
